General_PCR: Aliquot 3 uL of each lysed sample per desired loci. In another tube, combine {Taq 2X Master Mix} uL of Taq 2X Mix, {Primer Pair} uL of primer mix, and {Autoclaved Water} uL of autoclaved water. Aliquot 22uL each of PCR mix into {Samples} tubes per loci.
Tissue_Specific_PCR: Aliquot 3 uL of each lysed sample per desired loci. In another tube, combine {Taq 2X Master Mix} uL of Taq 2X Mix, {Primer Pair} uL of primer mix, and {Autoclaved Water} uL of autoclaved water. Aliquot 22uL each of PCR mix into {Samples} tubes per loci.
SNP_PCR: Aliquot 3 uL of each lysed sample per desired loci. In another tube, combine {Taq 2X Master Mix} uL of Taq 2X Mix, {Primer Pair} uL of primer mix, and {Autoclaved Water} uL of autoclaved water. Aliquot 22uL each of PCR mix into {Samples} tubes per loci.
